content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886
May 30, 2003

Heather Atkinson
Associate Compliance Officer
Oechsle International Advisors
One International Place
Boston, Massachusetts 02110

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-03-091

Dear Ms. Atkinson:

This letter is in response to your request for advice on behalf of John Power regarding the conflict of interest code provisions of the Political Reform Act (the “Act”).¹

After we discussed your issue on May 20, 2003, you informed me that you would contact Tulare County to discuss whether Mr. Power has filing obligations due to his contract work with Tulare County. On May 28, 2003, you informed me that you have contacted Tulare County and will be resolving this matter with the county and their staff counsel. Therefore, you do not need our advice and are withdrawing your advice request at this time.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: Jill Stecher
Counsel, Legal Division

JS:jg
I:\AdviceLtrs\03-091

¹ Government Code sections 81000 – 91014. Commission regulations appear at Title 2, sections 18109-18997, of the California Code of Regulations.
